title: Content Digests, Near-Duplicate Evidence, Change Classes, and History · Changed-Input Lab
summary: An independent community information owner supplies a different origin, HTML structure, rate contract, accessibility need, resource ceiling, and injected failure and transfers content digests, near-duplicate evidence, change classes, and history into a changed multi-stage versioned content evidence store. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of multi-stage versioned content evidence store with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, exp…
objectives: Label raw, decoded, DOM, selected-content, record, and rendered digests with algorithm and transformation version.
Distinguish URL alias, byte identity, admitted-record equality, replay, and observation duplication while retaining lineage.
Use token and structure features, thresholds, counterexamples, false-merge sampling, and stakeholder consequences.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Digest Stage
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab Go team handles case 1329 during an isolated binary, deployment, and restore defense. Build deterministic Go evidence to separate digest stages, exact and near identity, change classes, versions, tombstones, and deletion; every URL, body, tree, record, frontier transition, and report row retains causal identity; then reorder one origin, retry, channel, context, goroutine, Colly callback, checkpoint, or shutdown event and prove ownership. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Label raw, decoded, DOM, selected-content, record, and rendered digests with algorithm and transformation version.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Authorized site auditing and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Digest Stage.
